TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Michael D. Higgins ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Michael D. Higgins, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Ireland ta' misuw hya' ga Michael D. Higgins, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mi ¶~ ®ńßael *. ńßi…£…£ins~…ē rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mi ¶~ ®ńßael *. ńßi…£…£ins~…ē, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw irelan* ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mi ¶~ ®ńßael *. ńßi…£…£ins~…ē, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Michael D. Higgins ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Michael D. Higgins, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1941) mrhuw Ireland ta' misuw hya' ga Michael D. Higgins, aring ryax tay 11 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
